ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded (°C) */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded (°C) */,
  "tmean" REAL /* Mean temperature calculated (°C) */,
  "rain" REAL /* Amount of rainfall recorded (mm) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed recorded (m/s) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity recorded (%) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure recorded (hPa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station (m above sea level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NOAA, Local Weather Stations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source and its data collection methodology */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type (e.g., Rain, Snow, Clear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather phenomenon */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Researcher, Meteorologist, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the weather is predicted */,
  "predicted_tmax" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature (°C) */,
  "predicted_tmin" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature (°C) */,
  "predicted_tmean" REAL /* Predicted mean temperature (°C) */,
  "predicted_rain" REAL /* Predicted amount of rainfall (mm) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Weather forecasting model used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES weather_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
